composite_note: If any category is fail, the run is fail (SDD §5.4). A gate is only as hard as its underlying capability.

illegal_action_rate.note: invalid_action_detectable=true → hard gate; any nonzero detectable illegal-action rate is a correctness bug, not a strategy result.

timeout_rate.note: No per-move budget is published (timeout undetectable) → soft warning only. An undetectable rate is never a pass.

win_rate.note: Sprint 00 makes NO strength claim; win_rate is reported, never gated (ladder Rung 1).

note: Minimal Sprint 00 spec (SDD §5.4). Gates check correctness (legality / completion), not strength. There is no strength gate in Sprint 00; the ledger's claim_ceiling bounds interpretation instead.
